tool_input.command: for sec in s12 s16 s8 s13 s5; do echo "=== $sec ==="; jq -r --arg sec "$sec" '([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | "# " + .title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content' knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json; echo; done
